message:
refactor(arena): rebuild free list in-place during retain, add test

The arena retain() method previously collected all vacant slot indices
into a temporary Vec, then iterated it to link them. This required an
allocation proportional to the number of vacant slots and used an
awkward pattern to avoid double-mutable-borrow issues with the
intermediate collection.

Replaced with a single-pass in-place algorithm that tracks first_free
and last_free pointers, linking vacant slots as they're discovered
during the forward scan. Each iteration does a read-only vacancy check
followed by a targeted mutable borrow of the specific slot being
linked—no intermediate collection needed.

Also adds test_retain() covering: retain removes the right elements,
len is updated, removed slots return None from get(), newly inserted
items reuse the freed slots in forward order, and generations are
properly bumped on reuse.

Also includes a beads history snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
